titleStmt.title: SII 26.269: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 269. (A.R. No. 254 of 1909.) PAṬṬUKAṆĀMPAṬṬI, KARUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Rock near the ruined Śiva temple.

This inscription begins with the praśasti of the king. It records a gift of land as iṟaiyili for offerings at the service called tiruchcheṉṉaḍai to the god Mahādēva at Nelvāy by Naṉṉikāmuṇḍaṉ, son of Erumaiya-nāḻ-Kāmuṇḍaṉ alias Vīraśōḻakāmuṇḍaṉ of Ariyūr in Puṟamalai-nāḍu, while Pañchavaṉ Brahmādarāyar, a peruntaram of the king, was ruling from Tagaḍūr-nāḍu which was granted to him for maintenance (by the king). It also makes mention of the villages of Pāppāṉpāḍi, Kaṉṉāḍu, and Puttūr among the boundaries of the gift-land.
At the end of the inscription, a grant in this year of a nandā lamp to the god Mahādēvar (of Nelvāy) made by the people of Puṟamalai-nāḍu is also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyun taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kala
maṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyun taṭikaivaḻiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅkollamuṅ kaliṅ
kamu meṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamu miraṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ
koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻiyuḷellā yāṇṭiluṅ toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭeceḻiñaraittecukoḷ śrīko
rājarājakecarivarmarāṉa śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 5 vatu Uṭaiyār peruntarattu pañcavaṉ brahmātarāyar takaṭurnāṭu
jīvitamāḷāniṟka puṟamalaināṭṭu Ariyūruṭaiya Erumaiyaṉāḻkāmuṇṭāṉāṉa viracoḻakāmuṇṭaṉ makaṉ naṉṉi
kāmuṇṭaṉeṉeṉṉūr nelvāy mahādevarkku tirucceṉṉaṭaikku nivantamāka Iṟaiyiliceytu ku
ṭutta nilamāvatu kiḻpāṟkellaiyāṟṟiṉ melkkaraiyun teṉpāṟkellai bhaṭāri koyilukku vaṭakku melpā
ṟkellai pāppāṉpāṭi meṟpoṉa vaḻiyiṟ kaṉṉāṭṭukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai puttūrellaikkut
teṟku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattileṉṉeriyuṅ kaḻaṉiyum kollaiyuñ cantrātitteval nikki Udakapūrva
ñceytu kuṭutteṉ Idharma Iṟakkuvār geṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭai naṭuvuppaṭṭār ceyta pāvaṅkoḷ
vār Itu rakṣippāṉ śrīpātam Aṭiyeṉāyattalaimelaṉa .§ Ivvāṇṭu puṟamalai nāṭṭu nāṭṭomivvū
r mahādevarkku vaitta nan=tāviḷakkoṉṟiṉukku Iṉṉāṭṭu ciṟṟūr perureṉṉāteyūrā tūmameṇṇai cantrā
titteval maṭuvatākacceytu kuṭutto mitaṉṟeṉpā ṉeḻāṉarakattukkuk kiḻāṉarakam pukuvāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 26.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
